heading: About Me
paragraphs: Hi, I’m a web developer with hands-on experience since 2016, helping clients build, fix, and manage CMS websites Such as WordPress, Shopify, and Xenforo.
Currently, I’m expanding my skills in modern full-stack development using the MERN stack (React, Node.js, Express, MongoDB) to create scalable and user-friendly applications.
What sets me apart is my strong foundation in how the web works, from servers to frontend, which allows me to build practical, reliable solutions that meet real user needs.
Outside of coding, I enjoy exploring new tools, reading, and spending time on community-focused learning and mentoring conversations.
